insert needle into the stitch directly below the next stitch on the left needle, knit it, and let the upper stitch drop
knit into the center of the stitch one row below
insert needle into the stitch one row below purlwise, purl it, drop the upper stitch
insert the needle into the stitch below and knit it in a twisted orientation
work the stitch below through the back loop or crossed orientation, then let the upper stitch drop
drop the next stitch off the needle and allow it to ladder down
drop stitch: let the next stitch fall off the needle
drop the next stitch off the needle and let it ladder down
slide bead up to sit in front of the next stitch, then slip the stitch purlwise
place bead: using crochet hook, place bead over the stitch
slide the bead into place and knit the next stitch
place bead, knit
slide the bead into place and purl the next stitch
place bead, purl
catch the floating strand behind the working stitch
work a knit stitch using the back strand, alternating with the front strand
work a purl stitch using the back strand, alternating with the front strand
work both strands across, crossing them between every stitch to form a braid
knit 1 through back loop using twined method
purl 1 through back loop using twined method
